# Atlia

## What Atlia Is

Atlia builds AI-native software that makes traditional small and medium businesses radically more efficient. We turn America's SMBs AI-native. Backed by Y Combinator.

Most SMBs run on legacy workflows, and their data is scattered across email, messages, CRMs, and databases — none of it built for AI. Atlia rebuilds that data into a foundation AI agents can act on, then modernizes the workflows around it. The result: employees get their time back, revenue goes up, and a team of 20 can operate like a team of 200.

## Who Atlia Is Built For

- **SMBs in physical industries** — businesses in the physical economy, from manufacturing to physical contracting to client-facing healthcare, that run on workflows and tools predating AI
- **Operators and founders** running traditional businesses who want to do more with the team they already have
- **SMB owners** looking to free up their employees' time and increase revenue by becoming AI-native

## What Atlia Does

- **Unifies your data**: brings together the data scattered across email, messages, CRMs, and databases
- **Rebuilds it for AI**: transforms that data into a foundation AI agents can actually act on
- **Modernizes workflows**: rebuilds the workflows on top of that foundation, so AI agents handle the manual, repetitive work

Atlia turns traditional American SMBs into leaders in the AI-native world.

## Company

- **Founded:** 2026
- **Backed by:** Y Combinator
- **Contact:** founders@atlia.com
- **Website:** https://www.atlia.com
